scripts.test: npm run check:domain && node --import tsx --test src/*.test.ts src/domain/*.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: npm run check:domain && node --import tsx --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter=./src/domainCoverageReporter.mjs --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter-destination=stdout src/*.test.ts src/domain/*.test.ts
